top_signals.title: Oil slides nearly 2% as markets look past fresh Iran tensions and focus on supply outlook
top_signals.summary: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while digesting a flurry of news from the region.
